positive: A majestic, symmetrical celestial guardian creature, rendered in a detailed neo-tribal stencil art style. The creature features intricate feathering, glowing bioluminescent accents, and sharp, symmetrical geometry. Composition is central and balanced, designed for maximum contrast on a dark fabric background. Use a limited palette of deep midnight blues, metallic gold, stark cyan, and ivory white. The art must resemble high-quality screen printing or vector engraving, with sharp lines, clean silhouettes, and no gradients. Focus on mandalas, cosmic dust swirls, and ancient astronomical symbols integrated into the creature's form. High resolution, highly detailed illustration, printable graphic design.
negative: low detail, noisy, blurry, poorly drawn, bad anatomy, text, signature, watermark, logo, copyright, messy, gradient, jpeg artifacts, out of focus, extra limbs, cartoonish, childish
